```tsx
import React from 'react';
import { Thumbnail, Item, Label } from '@elements/react';
function Example() {
  return (
    <>
      <wje-item>
        <wje-thumbnail slot="start">
          <img alt="Silhouette of mountains" src="../../../../img/demos/thumbnail.svg" />
        </wje-thumbnail>
        <wje-label>Item</wje-label>
      </wje-item>
    </>
  );
}
export default Example;
```
